case_title: JOSHUA, ALBERT vs. RODRIGUEZ, ANNA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOSHUA, ALBERT AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ANNA GONZALEZ, JACKELINE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOSHUA, ALBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, JACKELINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1778 MISSION ST #1, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. CCP 415.46.
